examples.title: Basic wait() Example
examples.description: Parent waits for child and displays exit status
examples.explanation: Fork creates child; parent calls wait() which blocks until child exits; WIFEXITED checks normal termination; WEXITSTATUS extracts exit code 42

examples.title: waitpid() with WNOHANG Example
examples.description: Non-blocking wait for specific child process
examples.explanation: WNOHANG makes waitpid non-blocking; returns 0 if child running, returns PID if child terminated; allows parent to do other work while polling

examples.title: Handling Multiple Children
examples.description: Parent waits for all children using wait() in loop
examples.explanation: Parent forks 3 children with different exit codes; calls wait() repeatedly in loop to reap each child as they terminate; loop ends when all children are reaped

examples.title: Wait Status Macro Usage
examples.description: Demonstrates different WIF macros for various termination scenarios
examples.explanation: Demonstrates WIFEXITED (normal exit), WIFSIGNALED (signal death), WIFSTOPPED (job control), WIFCONTINUED (resumed); extracts appropriate information using WEXITSTATUS, WTERMSIG, WSTOPSIG
